title: The Not-self Strategy
author: Thanissaro Bhikkhu
summary: Is the central Buddhist teaching of anatta (not-self) a statement of metaphysical truth, or is it a strategy for gaining release from suffering? Through a careful study of the key passages from the Pali canon on the subject of anatta, the author here demonstrates the latter to be the case. (This is a revised version of Ven. Thanissaro's first essay on the subject, which originally appeared in the magazine "Insight" in 1994. For a more concise treatment see , "No-self or Not-self?.")
